title: Phone & Digital
description: Buy load, connect to Wi-Fi, send messages, and handle GCash in the Philippines.
situation: Staying connected: SIM cards, mobile load, Wi-Fi, messaging, and digital payments.

phrases.native: Saan po ako pwedeng bumili ng SIM card?
phrases.english: Where can I buy a SIM card?
phrases.pronunciation: sa-AN po a-KO PWE-deng boo-MEE-li nang sim kard
phrases.tip: Globe and Smart are the two big networks.

phrases.english: I'd like to buy mobile credit
phrases.tip: Load is prepaid mobile credit, sold in tiny sari-sari stores everywhere.

phrases.native: Magkano po ang load para sa data?
phrases.english: How much is load for data?
phrases.pronunciation: mag-KA-no po ang lod PA-ra sa DA-ta

phrases.native: Ano po ang password ng Wi-Fi?
phrases.pronunciation: a-NO po ang PAS-word nang way-FAY

phrases.tip: Mahina (weak) is the opposite of malakas (strong).

phrases.native: Pwede po bang i-charge ang telepono?
phrases.pronunciation: PWE-de po bang ee-tsarj ang te-LE-po-no

phrases.tip: Texting is deeply woven into Filipino daily life.
GCash is the most popular mobile wallet in the country.
Common for keeping in touch with family overseas.
